title: [codereview-pass3.2] added add_route delegation bypasses DAO sequence replay protection and parent_map rebuild in DaoManager.process_dao; direct table mutation bypasses security
close_reason: Fixed DaoManager.process_dao with seq_is_newer replay protection (matches Rust+tests), parent_map+dao_seq_map updates, RoutingTable.clear()+_rebuild_routes (no _routes mutation). Updated test_parent_change_updates_route to reuse mgr for seq increment. Ruff+tests+mypy (pre-existing only) pass. 3 codereview passes clean after fixes (no new P0-P2 findings filed/closed). See edits in dao.py:157 routing.py:103 test_dao.py:112
